nasb.text: that the daughters of Israel went yearly to commemorate the daughter of Jephthah the Gileadite four days in the year.

esv.text: that the daughters of Israel went year by year to lament the daughter of Jephthah the Gileadite four days in the year.

cnv.text: 以色列的女子年年都去哀悼基列人耶弗他的女兒，每年四日。

ccb.text: 每年以色列的女子都去为基列人耶弗他的女儿哀哭四天。
